rulings.Case Title: ROBERT SETNIK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant RCA Corporation's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Goulds Pumps, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs' negligence, strict liability and loss of consortium causes of action are denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Metcalf was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Mr. Metcalf's deposition testimony and plaintiffs' responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am, not 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendants Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc. and Hanson Permanente Cement Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs' claim for punitive damages is denied. Plaintiffs submitted sufficient evidence to create a triable issue whether defendant acted with the requisite malice or oppression to warrant the imposition of punitive damages. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am, not 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant J.S. Guerin & Company's motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden and plaintiffs failed to present admissible evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Metcalf was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am, not 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Honeywell International's motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs' request for punitive damages is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiffs did not present sufficient evidence to create a triable issue whether defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression by clear and convincing evidence. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am, not 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 1, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Oakfabco Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Mr. Metcalf's deposition testimony and declaration create a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Dr. Bruch's declaration creates a triable issue whether such exposure was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to his risk of developing mesothelioma. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am, not 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
